subcodes.first_line: The fragrant breaths of your love are wafted abroad and, God willing, shall forever and eternally endure, blessed with this heavenly bounty and divine gift [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفحات محبت آنجناب متضوع انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال باین نعمت رحمانی و عطیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
